final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an editorial photo of Korean café-style fashionable coffee and desserts, shot in a smartphone aesthetic suitable for Instagram. No people. Then, observe every element that appears in the photo and add meaningful hand-drawn annotations to each one.

Style/medium: smartphone photography, Korean café aesthetic, Instagram-ready; overlaid hand-drawn white-pen annotations — thin lines, single-stroke style, slightly rough and uneven; outline traces around object edges; arrows and dashed lines for visual flow; Instagram Stories × rough magazine notebook style
Composition: flat lay or slight overhead angle, fashionable and relaxed framing with intentional negative space
Subject: coffee drink and desserts/sweets, no people
Scene/backdrop: Korean café setting
Lighting/mood: soft, bright, airy — café natural light
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): hand-written Japanese annotations (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji); short diary-like one-liners in a monologue tone — drink → taste/temperature/mood (e.g., さっぱり、やさしい甘さ); food → texture/deliciousness (e.g., しっとり、さいこう); space → atmosphere (e.g., まったり、いい時間); overall → one-line summary (e.g., しあわせすぎた～); decorative elements: steam wisps, sparkles ✨, small hearts ♡, tiny emoticons — used sparingly, preserving white space
Constraints: white-pen style hand-drawn lines only for annotations; annotations must feel like a personal diary entry, not a label; keep negative space — do not over-decorate
Avoid: people or human figures; heavy or overly polished illustration style; cluttered annotation layout
